title: Equifax to Expand I-9 Anywhere® with New Virtual Option
text: Virtual Capability Will Help Employers More Easily Onboard Remote Workers Amidst New DHS Regulations  ATLANTA , Oct. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Equifax ® (NYSE: EFX) is addressing the growing demand for flexible, remote onboarding services by offering a virtual component of its award-winning I-9 Anywhere ® solution. This enhancement will make it easier for eligible employers to streamline their onboarding processes and enhance new hire experiences.

title: Equifax (EFX) Lags Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Equifax (EFX) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.76 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.78 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.73 per share a year ago.

title: Equifax's stock drops as outlook is cut
text: Equifax Inc. shares fell in the extended session Wednesday after the credit-score agency cut its outlook for the year, blaming a weak mortgage market that is expected to continue in the current quarter.

title: Equifax Third Quarter Results Show Strong Execution Towards Strategic Priorities In Challenging Mortgage Market
text: ATLANTA , Oct. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Equifax ® (NYSE: EFX) today announced financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2023. Third quarter 2023 revenue of $1.319 billion up 6% and up 6.5% in local currency against a weaker than expected mortgage market estimated to be down 29% based on Equifax mortgage credit inquiries and the strengthening U.S. dollar, which negatively impacted revenue.

title: Equifax fined over £11 million for mass cybersecurity failures
text: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) Ltd, a subsidiary of blue-chip credit agency Equifax Inc, has been fined more than £11 million by the UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) for its failure to oversee and secure UK consumer data outsourced to its US-based parent company. In 2017, a significant cybersecurity breach at Equifax exposed the personal data of approximately 13.8 million UK customers.

title: Equifax Announces Earnings Release Date and Conference Call for Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: ATLANTA , Oct. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Equifax ® (NYSE: EFX) will announce its financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2023 in a release to be issued on October 18 after the market closes. Equifax will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m.
